created.upgradedDescription: An existing shared user was upgraded to a full account. Share this temporary password with {userName}.
created.createdDescription: A temporary password was generated for {userName}. Share it with them to sign in.
created.upgradedToast: {userName} was upgraded to a full account

changeRole.message: Are you sure you want to {action} {userName} to {role}?

toggleStatus.disableMessage: Are you sure you want to disable {userName}? They will be unable to log in.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password?
resetPassword.message: This will generate a new temporary password for {userName}. They will be required to change it on next login.

deleteUser.title: Delete User?
deleteUser.message: Are you sure you want to delete {userName}? This will permanently remove their account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. If they are a delegate of another account, their own data is removed but their login is kept so the delegation still works -- they become a delegate-only user.
deleteUser.downgradedToast: {userName}'s own data was removed; their delegate access remains.

createUser.title: Add User
createUser.description: Create a new account. You can email an invite, set a password yourself, or generate a temporary one to share.
createUser.inviteOption: Send an email invite to set a password
createUser.temporaryHint: Shown once after creation. The user must change it on first login.

resetPasswordModal.defaultDescriptionPrefix: A temporary password has been set for
resetPasswordModal.warning: This password will not be shown again.
resetPasswordModal.changeOnNextLogin: The user will be required to change their password on next login.
